nodes.name: constitution.md
nodes.summary: novel2epub project constitution v1.0.0 defining five core principles.

nodes.name: novel2epub Constitution
nodes.summary: Top-level constitution heading for the project.

nodes.name: Core Principles
nodes.summary: Five core principles governing all features.

nodes.name: I. Source Metadata Completeness
nodes.summary: Every feature must preserve complete source-level metadata for EPUB building.

nodes.name: II. Translation Fidelity and Glossary Discipline
nodes.summary: CN-to-VI translation must follow traditional edit rules with Sino-Vietnamese naming.

nodes.name: III. Idempotent Crawl/Translate/Build Pipeline
nodes.summary: Crawler, translator, EPUB builder must be resumable and idempotent across CLI/Web UI.

nodes.name: IV. Chapter-Level User Control
nodes.summary: Users can inspect/act on chapters independently with ordering, filtering, range selection.

nodes.name: V. Independently Testable Delivery
nodes.summary: Every user-facing story independently testable through CLI, Web UI, or service tests.

nodes.name: Product Constraints
nodes.summary: Python 3.10+, disk storage under data/<slug>/, CLI-Web UI compatibility, engine-selectable crawling.

nodes.name: Development Workflow
nodes.summary: Plans must pass Constitution Check; specs define independently deliverable stories.

nodes.name: Governance
nodes.summary: Constitution amendment rules, semver versioning, review requirements.
